name: Theravance Biopharma, Inc.
business: Theravance Biopharma is a biopharmaceutical company primarily focused on the development and commercialization of medicines, with a lead product YUPELRI (revefenacin) inhalation solution indicated for maintenance treatment of patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). The company co-developed YUPELRI with Viatris Inc. and co-promotes it in the US under a profit and loss sharing arrangement. As of the filing, the company is winding down its ampreloxetine program after a failed Phase 3 study and implementing an organizational restructuring to focus on YUPELRI commercialization.

exposures.sentence: YUPELRI (revefenacin) inhalation solution is a once-daily, nebulized long-acting muscarinic antagonist (LAMA) approved for the maintenance treatment of COPD in the US.

catalysts.event: Announcement of ampreloxetine Phase 3 CYPRESS study top-line results
catalysts.sentence: On March 3, 2026, we announced that our ampreloxetine Phase 3 clinical study (CYPRESS) in development for the treatment of symptomatic neurogenic orthostatic hypotension in patients with multiple system atrophy did not meet its primary endpoint.

catalysts.event: Receipt of $25 million milestone payment from Viatris for YUPELRI US net sales achievement
catalysts.sentence: In addition, in January 2026, we received a $25.0 million milestone payment for the achievement of $250.0 million in US net sales in 2025.

catalysts.event: Receipt of $50 million milestone payment from Royalty Pharma for 2025 TRELEGY global net sales
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we received a $50.0 million maximum milestone payment from Royalty Pharma Investments associated with the achievement of certain minimum royalty payments related to 2025 TRELEGY global net sales.

catalysts.event: Organizational restructuring implementation to reduce operating expenses
catalysts.sentence: While the Committee accelerates its review, we are implementing an organizational restructuring (the Restructuring) to streamline costs and align our resources with our commercial focus on YUPELRI.
